title: Rail Fix
description: Fixes the stretched texture on slanted rails
body:
This pack replaces the texture for slanted rails with a 16×24 pixel texture and a custom block model. This fixes the issue where the rail appears stretched or distorted. It will not effect the appearance of rails on a flat surface.

This resource pack is only published on Modrinth and CurseForge.

<summary>Preview</summary>

![Rail Fix Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/481jOCry/images/7c0d01af3b1f2200545b607fdae4446d53ab2597.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Permissions</summary>
  
You may:
- Create and publish modified versions
- Include modified versions of this within your own resource packs
- Include this in modpacks published to Modrinth or CurseForge

You may not:
- Reupload or redistribute this pack or any assets from this page in unmodified form
  
</details>

<details>
<summary>About Updates</summary>

I usually only test pack updates on the latest version of Minecraft. Resource packs are almost always backwards and forwards compatible. If you experience any issues or if the pack doesn't work, please report it to me.

</details>

If you have a feature request, feel free to create an issue on my issue tracker
